title: Hollyone 5PCS Glittery Christmas Branches with Sequins, Gold Arificial Plant with Long Stems, Faux Sticks for Xmas Tree Decorations, Winter Wedding, Floral Arrangement, Party
features: Are you looking for a stylish and easy-care way to give your home a Christmas flair? This set of 5 decorative stems with glitter, 78cm/30.7'' long, is the perfect solution for anyone who values stylish decorations. Please be aware that some glitter may fall off when opening the packaging. Handle with care.

Discover the beauty of branch decoration with our shimmering stems, which add a natural yet elegant touch to any room. The multi-part branch is fitted with around sequins and carefully sprinkled with a light layer of glitter, giving it a magnificent, festive finish.

Faux twigs with bendable long stems are perfect for handicrafts, decorations, and floristry of all kinds. Create fascinating Advent wreaths or front door garland in the Christmas decoration. Or create a particularly original table decoration by placing the branch decoration on a table runner or tall vase with other fake flowers. There are no limits to creativity!

Even though these are artificial plants, the detailed replica of the real branch is so authentic that it invites you to linger and admire it. The finely crafted branch decoration fits harmoniously into any vase or arrangement and can be wonderfully combined with other decorative elements. Its captivating appearance makes it a must-have for lovers of long-lasting and easy-care room accents.

Get your artificial branches now and prepare for the upcoming festive season. These glittery branches also make a wonderful gift for friends and family who enjoy beautiful decorations. Experience the quality and versatility of our Christmas ornaments!
